body_transformation: The compact body silhouette remains intact, now rendered in deep violet and ebony black with ghostly silver accents along the spiky back fur. The curled tail tip dissolves into wispy shadowy vapor while retaining its shape, and the striped leg patterns become faint, translucent energy trails. The pale cream underbelly transforms into a translucent, misty layer revealing faint internal energy currents beneath. The ear tips fade into ethereal violet mist, maintaining their rounded shape without structural change.
signature_feature: Tail tip: dissolving shadow vapor with swirling crimson mist eddies.
